6:  */
7: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

9: import { handleCodyApiError } from '@/lib/cody/github-error-handler'
10: import { pipelineParamsSchema } from '@/lib/cody/schemas'

14:   findTaskBranch,
15: <<<<<<< HEAD
16: =======
17:   findBranchByIssueNumber,
18:   getStatusFromBranch,
19:   findStatusOnBranch,
20: >>>>>>> origin/dev
21:   getStatusFromArtifact,
22:   getStatusFromBranch,
23:   fetchWorkflowRuns,
24: } from '@/ui/cody/github-client'
25: 
26: export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: Promise<{ taskId: string }> }) {
27:   // Check auth
28:   const authError = await requireAuth(req)
29:   if (authError) return authError
30: 
31:   // Validate path params
32:   const { taskId: rawTaskId } = await params
33:   const parsed = pipelineParamsSchema.safeParse({ taskId: rawTaskId })
34:   if (!parsed.success) {
35:     return apiValidationError(parsed.error)
36:   }
37:   const { taskId } = parsed.data
38: 
39:   try {
40:     // Try branch status first (for running tasks)
41:     const branch = await findTaskBranch(taskId)
42:     if (branch) {
43:       let status = await getStatusFromBranch(taskId, branch)
44:       // Fallback: discover task ID by scanning .tasks/ directory
45:       if (!status) {
46:         status = await findStatusOnBranch(branch)
47:       }
48:       if (status) {
49:         return NextResponse.json({
50:           status,
51:           source: 'branch',
52:         })
53:       }
54:     }
55: 
56:     // If taskId looks like an issue number, try finding branch by issue number
57:     if (/^\d+$/.test(taskId)) {
58:       const issueBranch = await findBranchByIssueNumber(parseInt(taskId))
59:       if (issueBranch) {
60:         const status = await findStatusOnBranch(issueBranch)
61:         if (status) {
62:           return NextResponse.json({
63:             status,
64:             source: 'branch',
65:           })
66:         }
67:       }
68:     }
69: 
70:     // Try artifact status (for completed tasks)
71:     const workflowRuns = await fetchWorkflowRuns({ perPage: 10 })
72:     const run = workflowRuns.find((r) => r.html_url.includes(taskId))
73: 
74:     if (run) {
75:       const status = await getStatusFromArtifact(taskId, run.id.toString())
76:       if (status) {
77:         return NextResponse.json({
78:           status,
79:           source: 'artifact',
80:         })
81:       }
82:     }
83: 
84:     // No status found
85:     return NextResponse.json({
86:       status: null,
87:       source: null,
88:     })
89:   } catch (error: unknown) {
90:     return handleCodyApiError(error, 'pipeline')
91:   }
92: }
